access_intro: Grant people access to this project by role. Viewers read, editors author and run, managers also administer.
access_empty: No one has access to this project yet.
access_error_last_manager: A project must keep at least one manager.
access_error_any_user_manager: Anyone with an account cannot be a manager.
gate_no_permission: You don't have permission to do this.
roadmap_subtitle: What works today, what we're building next, and what's coming later.
roadmap_disclaimer: The order can change, and we don't promise dates here. This page is updated as we make progress.
roadmap_scope_item_runner: A tool that runs your tests for you
roadmap_scope_item_ai: An AI that writes tests for you
roadmap_scope_outro: Anything else? We'd love to hear it.
roadmap_suggest_body: Tell us what you'd want trace to do. A few words is enough, the team reads every one.
banner_prealpha_message: trace is still very new. Some things may not work perfectly yet. Please tell us when you spot a problem.
execution_abort_modal_body_one: {count} scenario is still pending. It will be marked SKIPPED and the run will be closed as ABORTED.
execution_abort_modal_body_other: {count} scenarios are still pending. They will be marked SKIPPED and the run will be closed as ABORTED.
campaign_version_hint: CI runs reporting this version link to the campaign automatically.
campaign_no_features: No features in this campaign yet
campaign_close_body: Closing freezes the result and locks the campaign. This cannot be undone.
campaign_duplicate_version: An open campaign already targets this version.
campaign_duplicate_name: A campaign with this name already exists.
live_execution_evidence_hint: Screenshots, logs, or any file as proof.
live_execution_evidence_drop: Drop files or click to browse
feature_aside_no_executions_hint: Start one with the button above.
feature_editor_description_placeholder: Add notes, context, or anything worth documenting.
manual_scenario_no_steps: Manual check. No automated steps; record the verdict from your testing.
manual_scenario_name_taken_manual: A manual check with this name already exists in this feature.
manual_scenario_name_taken_gherkin: A Gherkin scenario with this name already exists in this feature.
manual_step_error: Could not save your change, please retry.
feature_save_manual_name_collision: Scenario name {name} conflicts with an existing manual check. Rename one of them before saving.
feature_no_runnable_scenarios: Cannot start a run, this feature has no Gherkin scenarios and no manual checks.
new_project_subtitle: Set up a workspace for a set of feature files.
new_project_code_prefix_hint: Features are numbered under this code, like code-1, code-2. Can't be changed later.
new_project_error_slug_taken: That short name is already taken. Try another.
new_project_error_invalid: Some fields look off — check the highlighted ones.
account_subtitle: Personal settings — applies to you across all projects.
account_appearance_body: Theme and accent are personal — they sync via a cookie and apply on every device you sign in from.
account_language_body: Affects the interface, dates and error messages.
login_bootstrap_subtitle: You're the first to arrive — create the account that will own this instance.
login_signup_subtitle: Sign up with email and password.
login_toggle_to_signup: Don't have an account? Sign up
login_toggle_to_signin: Already have an account? Sign in
login_closed_notice: Trace is private — ask your admin for access.
forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send instructions if an account exists.
forgot_password_done: If an account exists for that email, instructions are on their way. If you don't receive anything, contact your instance admin.
reset_password_subtitle: Pick a new password. The link is valid for {ttl} minutes.
reset_password_expired: This link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.
reset_password_success: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
change_password_success: Password updated. Other devices have been signed out.
change_password_oidc_only: Your account signs in with {provider}. Password change is handled by your SSO.
instance_signup_body: Trace is closed by default. Open a window to invite new users — the budget auto-exhausts so you can't forget to close it.
instance_demo_body: Trace seeds a demo project on first install. It's a normal project — delete it whenever you outgrow it.
instance_users_body: Everyone with an account on this instance.
instance_smtp_body: Configure outbound email so users can reset their own password. Without SMTP, you can still mint reset links manually below.
instance_smtp_status_unconfigured: Not configured · password reset emails disabled
instance_admin_reset_body: Generate a single-use link when a user can't reach the email path.
instance_admin_reset_oidc_warning: This account signs in with {provider}. Resetting will set a password, allowing both sign-in paths.
error_forbidden: You don't have access to this resource.
error_email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
error_password_too_short: Password must be at least {min} characters.
error_signup_fields_required: Name, email and password are required.
error_could_not_create_account: Could not create account — the email may already exist.
error_oidc_not_configured: Single sign-on is not configured on this server.
error_budget_must_be_positive: Seat budget must be a positive integer.
error_password_change_unavailable: Your account does not use a password.
error_smtp_test_no_config: Configure SMTP before sending a test.
error_smtp_decrypt_failed: SMTP password could not be decrypted. Re-enter it and save.
error_reset_link_invalid: This link is invalid or expired.
error_page_404_body: This path doesn't match any feature, run or project on this instance.
error_page_5xx_body: The request didn't make it through. Check the server logs — this trace is for you.
error_page_other_body: Trace returned this status without further detail.
